title: Mission & Values - 211info
text: 211info is a private, community-based nonprofit organization funded by state and municipal contracts, foundations, donations, and community partners. 211info serves all 36 counties in Oregon. Mission Empower Oregon communities by helping people identify, navigate, and connect with the local resources they need. Vision We are the trusted leader and partner in advancing well-being for all through equitable access to local community services. Commitment to Strengthening Communities We believe everyone should be able to access the help they need. As a community connector, we are committed to ensuring our services are accessible, responsive, and informed by the needs of the diverse communities we serve. We recognize that barriers exist in accessing health and social services, and we work to reduce those barriers by listening to our communities, refining our operations, and strengthening our partnerships to make navigating resources easier for everyone. Our work is grounded in continuous learning, accountability, and a commitment to serving all people with dignity and respect. These values guide our approach as we work to build stronger, more connected communities across Oregon. Read more about our workplace culture and values here . I had a family who recently arrived here to Portland from Africa and they needed support and resources so I spoke to one of your intake counselors and I want to say that I give her 10 stars. She was very helpful...Thank you for your program and your intake counselors and the work you do. It’s very appreciated. Thank you. - 211info caller
